en: How well did the contractor/supplier complete the project with regards to quality of materials and workmanship?
Comment - Quality of Materials and Workmanship
How well did the contractor/supplier adhere to all applicable environmental regulations and sustainability practices?
Please provide any additional comments or constructive feedback for this contractor:
How well did the contractor/supplier complete the project within the agreed-upon time frames and schedules?
If changes in schedule took place, how well did the contractor/supplier effectively communicate the changes?
How well did the contractor/supplier adhere to agreed-upon budget and costs?
If there was an incident, how well did the contractor/supplier resolve the issue in accordance with all applicable guidelines and regulation?
If cost changes were made, how well did the contractor communicate those changes?
How well did the contractor/supplier properly use personal protection equipment if required?
Comment - Use of Personal Protection Equipment
How well did the contractor/supplier follow all applicable health and safety guidelines throughout the duration of the project?
